name: Algebra
description: Pre-algebra foundations: variables, evaluating expressions, one-step equations, and patterns
objectives: Understand that a letter can stand for an unknown number
Identify the variable in an expression or equation
Evaluate simple expressions for a given whole-number value
Solve one-step addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division equations
Apply a rule to find the output (or input) of a number machine
Extend growing number patterns and describe their rules

ai.guidelines: Focus on using a letter as a variable for an unknown number, evaluating simple expressions for a given whole-number value (like 3 × n + 2 when n = 4), solving one-step addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division equations, applying input-output rules, and extending growing number patterns. Keep numbers within 0-100 and all answers whole numbers.
